search_signals.author: Gustafssonkotte
search_signals.text:
MRO strategy for 5-minute Bitcoin markets on Polymarket  
   Custom oscillator catches price reversals  
   MRO tracks when price moves too far with volume confirmation. Below -70 signals Up bet. Above +70 signals Down bet  
   Calculation compares current price and volume to values from 5 candles ago  
   Entry rules:  
   Up: MRO below -70, volume rising, price off lows  
   Down: MRO above +70, volume spike, price off highs  
   Confirm with 50 EMA trend direction  
   Probability adjustment

search_signals.author: GagantuaWEB3
search_signals.text:
A trader lost $500 on Polymarket last week. He bet yes on Bitcoin hitting $100k by month end because the price there was $0.60. He didn't know Kalshi had the same event at $0.40. If he saw both prices, he could have bet no on Polymarket or bought cheap yes on Kalshi and made money either way. He lost because he only looked at one site.  
   Prediction markets are sites where people bet real money on what will happen next. You bet yes or no on events like sports, crypto prices, or elections. Poly
